title: Morning Brief & Notifications UX Polish
description: Premium daily brief experience, history, timezone hour picker, smarter notifications.

userStories.title: Morning Brief page visual redesign
userStories.description: Hero header, colored section cards, skeleton loading, dynamic empty message from morning_brief_hour, FitBadge inline.

userStories.title: Brief history panel
userStories.description: Wire GET /api/brief/history to Previous briefs collapsible on /brief.

userStories.title: Morning brief hour picker in Settings
userStories.description: Expose morning_brief_hour 0-23 in Settings. Remove hardcoded 8am copy.

userStories.title: Notification bell mobile + smart actions
userStories.description: Bell on mobile nav. Draft follow-up links on stale/follow_up notifications. Fix icons.
